description: Partition the 'Hotels' data in the 'demodb' database into three geographic clusters for performance optimization. Using OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html) with database credentials (admin/admin) and server credentials (root/GymAnything123!), create and add three clusters to the 'Hotels' class: 'hotels_europe', 'hotels_americas', and 'hotels_asiapacific'. Move all existing Hotel vertices into these clusters based on their 'Country' field: 'hotels_europe' (Italy, Germany, France, United Kingdom, Spain, Greece, Netherlands), 'hotels_americas' (United States, Canada, Brazil), and 'hotels_asiapacific' (Japan, Australia). Generate a report at /home/ga/partitioning_report.txt containing the hotel count for each new cluster and the total count.
